creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Baptiste Daroussin from comment #6)
I didn't quite understand the question, but I tested building emulators/virtualbox-ose* with devel/kBuild built with GCC and CLANG from base: emulators/virtualbox-ose*-legacy fails with GCC, other ports build without errors with both GCC and CLANG.
